federation will now be created with a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"module-federation.config.ts"}]," file (as opposed to a ",["$","code",null,{"children":".js"}]," file). A new ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ModuleFederationConfig"}]," interface is also exported from the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nx/webpack"}]," plugin."]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"better-typesafety-across-modules","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Better Typesafety Across type-safety is currently supported across dynamic imports."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2023-10-20/bodyimg3.gif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"new-generator-federate-anything","className":"group 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nx/angular"}]," now include a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"federate-module"}]," generator. This will allow you to create a federated module from any Nx project."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"To run this generator, use the command:"}],["$","$Lc",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"children":"> nx g federate-module <module name> --path=<path to module to be exposed> --remote=<name of remote exposing module>\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["This will add a new module to the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"exposes"}]," map in the specified ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remote"}]," application, such that it can be consumed by a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"host"}]," application."]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"managing-module-versions","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Managing Module Versions",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#managing-module-versions","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Nx now supports targeted versioning for federated modules."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["To create versions for a given project, you can use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"version"}]," property of that project's ",["$","code",null,{"children":"package.json"}]," file and then build that project to create the version locally."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Then, when consuming this library, you can use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"shared"}]," method of the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ModuleFederationConfig"}],":"]}],["$","$Lc",null,{"language":"ts","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"children":"import { ModuleFederationConfig } from '@nx/webpack';\n\nconst config: ModuleFederationConfig = {\n  name: 'my-remote',\n  exposes: {\n    './Module': 'apps/my-remote/src/app/remote-entry/entry.module.ts',\n  },\n  remotes: ['federated-is-odd'],\n  shared: (libName, configuration) => {\n    if (libName === 'is-odd') {\n      return {\n        singleton: true,\n        strictVersion: true,\n        requiredVersion: '0.0.1',\n      };\n    }\n    return configuration;\n  },\n};\n\nexport default config;\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["This config will ensure that version ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0.0.1"}]," of the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"is-odd"}]," is used."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"more-consistent-generator-paths","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["More Consistent Generator Paths",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#more-consistent-generator-paths","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Similar to the ",["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bw8pRh0iC4A&t=14s","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"adjustments we made in 16.8","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," for most of our project-creating generators, v17 brings updates to how component generators work. These updates aim to give you more control over the name and file location of your components."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Towards this end, we’ve added a new ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--nameAndDirectoryFormat"}]," option that you can set to either ",["$","code",null,{"children":"as-provided"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"derived"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["When set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"as-provided"}],", the generator will use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"name"}]," option for the name of your component and the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"directory"}]," option to determine where on your file system to add the component. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"as-provided"}]," will be used by default if none is specified."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["When set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"derived"}],", the generator will try to determine where to create your component based on the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"project"}]," option - which will mainly operate how component generators do now."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"In addition, component generators now follow any given casing for component files. For example, let’s say we have an integrated monorepo with a react application called “my-app” and want to add a “Home” component. With Nx 17, you can run the command:"}],["$","$Lc",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"children":"> nx g component Home --directory=apps/my-app/src/app\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["And a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Home.tsx"}]," file will be added in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"apps/my-app/src/app"}]," directory."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"You can now also build your directory path right into the generator command. For example, the same “Home” component would be created via:"}],["$","$Lc",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"children":"> nx g component apps/my-app/src/app/Home\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Finally, generators will now factory in your current working directory, so you can also create this “Home” component via:"}],["$","$Lc",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"children":"> cd apps/my-app/src/app\n> nx g component Home\n"}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"the-new-nx-ai-chatbot","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["The NEW Nx AI ChatBot",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#the-new-nx-ai-chatbot","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["We’ve added a new AI ChatBot to our docs site. You can access it now at ",["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ai-chat","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"https://nx.dev/ai-chat","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2023-10-20/bodyimg4.gif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"This feature is still in beta, so please use the thumbs up/thumbs down buttons to provide feedback on whether the chatbot is accurate and helpful!"}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"more-seamless-integration-with-nx-cloud","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["More Seamless Integration With Nx Cloud",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#more-seamless-integration-with-nx-cloud","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["After running the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx migrate"}]," command to upgrade to Nx 17 and using Nx Cloud, you may have observed the removal of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx-cloud"}]," from your dev dependencies. Don't worry - Nx Cloud is not only still around but thriving. Instead of having a standalone package, we've integrated the Nx Cloud communication layer directly into the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx"}]," package. This ensures a seamless connection whenever you opt in and eliminates potential version misalignment concerns with our API endpoint."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"nxjson-simplification","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":[[["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," Simplification"],["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#nxjson-simplification","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Our Nx Cloud updates come alongside configuration changes in your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," file and project configuration."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Specifically, we’ve added an optional ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nxCloudAccessToken"}]," to the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," file - as long as a token is provided here, we'll make sure that you take advantage of the currently deployed version of Nx Cloud when running commands with Nx."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["We’ve also removed the need to specify ",["$","code",null,{"children":"cacheableOperations"}]," at the task-runner level. From now on, every ",["$","code",null,{"children":"target"}]," configured in your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"project.json"}]," can be defined as cacheable using the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"cache"}]," property."]}],["$","$Lc",null,{"language":"json","fileName":"nx.json","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"children":"{\n    \"targetDefaults\": {\n        \"build\": {\n            \"cache\": true,\n            ...\n        }\n    }\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["If you use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx migrate"}]," command, all updates will be handled for you using the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"targetDefaults"}]," in your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," file.
